title: Form Response Viewer - Submitted Responses Only
excerpt:
I need a way for designers on my team to process the information a requestor submits via the form quickly and easily, without seeing fields that do not have a response.

posts.author: susamc (Susan McCullick)
posts.cookedHtml:
I need a way for designers on my team to process the information a requestor submits via the form quickly and easily, without seeing fields that do not have a response.

The Form Response Viewer and “Cards” are close, but still rather clunky and display unneeded fields. The PDF version of our full form is 17 pages! This is an incredible amount of content to sort through to find what you need to quickly get started on a new project.

A cleaner version of form view is important because designers want to see the details at-a-glance and may even want to print a copy of the information.

Ideally, when you click on a row in the main view - you would also be able to quickly drill in and see the associated form.
